family_summary: Episode-first research bundle for the Armenian genocide using direct violent deaths as the core DR input. The family-level literature is much stronger on total destruction than on clean direct-versus-indirect separation, so this bundle fully estimates one city-level direct-killing episode and treats empire-wide deportation/camp mortality as mixed or unclassified context unless a source explicitly isolates violent deaths.
notes: Research window capped at 1917-12-31 per brief. Principal annihilation phase is generally dated spring 1915-autumn 1916; camp/deportee destruction and survival conditions extend into 1917.
